caption: The video shows a digital player card from "MADDEN 23" for a player named "TAYSOM HILL." The card is set against a dark, textured background with the "ULTIMATE TEAM" logo in the upper corners. Hill is depicted as a Tight End ("TE") with an overall rating of "95." He is wearing a white football jersey and helmet, holding a football. To the left of his image, several skill attributes are listed with numeric values and green progress bars: "SPD" at 93, "STR" at 88, "CTH" at 93, "CIT" at 93, "SPC" at 92, "SRR" at 95, "MRR" at 91, and "RBK" at 70. The card features a stylized blue and white aesthetic with a glowing aura around the player. Across all frames, the image remains static, showing no movement, changes in text, or modifications to the player's position.
